---
title: "Your Document Title"
author: "Sebastian Alamo Alonso"
date: "`r {Sys.setlocale('LC_TIME', 'en_US.UTF-8'); format(Sys.Date(), '%d %B %Y')}`"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
geometry: a4paper
fontsize: 12pt
lang: "en"
---

```{r echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Load libraries
library(fbi)
library(tidyverse)
library(stats)
library(pls)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
```

```{r}
# Bae (2024): "Some variables are transformed to be stationary..."

fred_transformed <- fredmd(file = "current.csv", transform = TRUE)

fred_df <- as.data.frame(fred_transformed) # coerce to plain data.frame and strip 'fredmd' class
class(fred_df) <- "data.frame"

```

```{r}
# truncate dataset at 1959-03-01 (due to NAs after transform) and 2019-12-01 for replication purposes

fred_df <- fred_df %>%
  filter(date <= as.Date("2019-12-01")) %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("1959-03-01"))
```

```{r}
# Bae (2024): "...Then, the transformed variables are standardized to have unit variance and mean zero..."

X_raw   <- as.matrix(fred_df[, -1])   # predictors only
dates   <- fred_df$date

X_std   <- scale(X_raw)               # column-wise, NA-aware
panel_std0 <- data.frame(date = dates, X_std)
```

```{r}
# Bae (2024): "...Finally, the data are screened for outliers: Any observations whose values exceed ten times the interquartile range from the median are treated as missing values..."

remove_outliers_10iqr <- function(x) {
  med <- median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  iqr <- IQR(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  # if iqr is zero or NA, do nothing
  if (is.na(iqr) || iqr == 0) return(x)
  
  lower <- med - 10 * iqr
  upper <- med + 10 * iqr
  
  x[x < lower | x > upper] <- NA
  x
}

X_std_clean <- as.data.frame(lapply(panel_std0[, -1], remove_outliers_10iqr))
panel_std1  <- data.frame(date = panel_std0$date, X_std_clean)
```

```{r}
# Bae (2024): "...Factors are estimated only from the balanced panel with 108 predictors." -> balanced predictors = no NA

predictor_matrix <- panel_std1[, -1]

good_cols <- colnames(predictor_matrix)[
  apply(predictor_matrix, 2, function(col) all(is.finite(col)))
]

cat("Balanced predictors:", length(good_cols), "\n")

panel_final <- data.frame(
  date = panel_std1$date,
  predictor_matrix[, good_cols, drop = FALSE]
)

```

```{r}
# 
construct_target <- function(x, h) {
  n <- length(x)
  out <- rep(NA_real_, n)
  out[1:(n - h)] <- x[(1 + h):n]
  out
}

horizons <- c(1, 6, 12, 24)
targets_list <- list()

for (j in 2:ncol(panel_final)) {
  series_name <- names(panel_final)[j]
  x <- panel_final[[j]]

  targets_list[[series_name]] <- lapply(horizons, function(h) {
    construct_target(x, h)
  })
  names(targets_list[[series_name]]) <- paste0("h", horizons)
}
```

```{r}
DEBUG_PLS <- FALSE   # set FALSE to silence
DEBUG_ORIGINS <- c(60, 120, 240)  # a few t_idx values to inspect
```


```{r}

extract_pca <- function(X, k_max = 12) {
  # X: T x N, bereits standardisiert (mean 0, sd 1)
  pca <- prcomp(X, center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)
  
  # Scores: T x k_max
  F_hat <- pca$x[, 1:k_max, drop = FALSE]
  
  # Loadings: N x k_max
  loadings <- pca$rotation[, 1:k_max, drop = FALSE]
  
  list(F = F_hat, loadings = loadings)
}

extract_pls <- function(X, y, k_max = 12) {
  df <- data.frame(y = y, X)
  df_fit <- df[!is.na(df$y), , drop = FALSE]

  if (nrow(df_fit) <= 2) stop("Zu wenige Beobachtungen für PLS an diesem Origin.")

  # Key sanity checks on the training window
  if (exists("DEBUG_PLS") && isTRUE(DEBUG_PLS)) {
    y_sd <- sd(df_fit$y, na.rm = TRUE)
    msg <- sprintf(
      "[PLS] nrow(df_fit)=%d, ncol(X)=%d, k_max=%d, sd(y)=%.6f, anyNA(X_fit)=%s",
      nrow(df_fit), ncol(X), k_max, y_sd, anyNA(df_fit[, -1, drop=FALSE])
    )
    message(msg)
  }

  pls_fit <- plsr(
    y ~ .,
    data   = df_fit,
    ncomp  = min(k_max, ncol(X)),
    center = TRUE,
    scale  = FALSE,
    method = "oscorespls"
  )

  # What did the model actually fit?
  if (exists("DEBUG_PLS") && isTRUE(DEBUG_PLS)) {
    message(sprintf(
      "[PLS] pls_fit$ncomp=%s | dim(pls_fit$scores)=%s | dim(pls_fit$loading.weights)=%s",
      paste0(pls_fit$ncomp, collapse=""),
      paste(dim(pls_fit$scores), collapse="x"),
      paste(dim(pls_fit$loading.weights), collapse="x")
    ))
  }

  X_all <- df[, setdiff(names(df), "y"), drop = FALSE]
  K <- min(k_max, ncol(X))
  scores_arr <- predict(pls_fit, newdata = X_all, ncomp = 1:K, type = "scores")

  if (DEBUG_PLS) {
    message(sprintf("[PLS] requested ncomp = %s", paste(1:K, collapse=",")))
    message(sprintf("[PLS] dim(scores_arr) = %s", paste(dim(scores_arr), collapse="x")))
  }

  # Convert to matrix deterministically
  if (length(dim(scores_arr)) == 3) {
    F_hat <- scores_arr[, , 1, drop = TRUE]
  } else if (length(dim(scores_arr)) == 2) {
    F_hat <- scores_arr
  } else {
    stop("Unerwartete Dimensionen der PLS-Scores.")
  }
  F_hat <- as.matrix(F_hat)

  if (exists("DEBUG_PLS") && isTRUE(DEBUG_PLS)) {
    message(sprintf("[PLS] dim(F_hat)=%s | ncol(F_hat)=%d | first-row=%s",
                    paste(dim(F_hat), collapse="x"),
                    ncol(F_hat),
                    paste(round(F_hat[1, 1:min(5, ncol(F_hat))], 4), collapse=",")
    ))
  }

  colnames(F_hat) <- paste0("F", seq_len(ncol(F_hat)))
  list(F = F_hat, model = pls_fit)
}


```

```{r}
extract_factors_at_origin <- function(panel_final,
                                      targets_list,
                                      target_name,
                                      h,
                                      t_origin,
                                      k_max_pca = 12,
                                      k_max_pls = 12) {
  # Zeitfenster bis t_origin
  idx_win <- which(panel_final$date <= t_origin)
  X_win   <- panel_final[idx_win, -1, drop = FALSE]
  
  # --- PCA ---
  pca_out <- extract_pca(X_win, k_max = k_max_pca)
  
  # --- PLS ---
  y_full <- targets_list[[target_name]][[paste0("h", h)]]
  y_win  <- y_full[idx_win]
  
  pls_out <- extract_pls(X_win, y_win, k_max = k_max_pls)
  
  list(
    pca = list(
      F        = pca_out$F,        # length(idx_win) x k_pca
      loadings = pca_out$loadings,
      idx      = idx_win
    ),
    pls = list(
      F     = pls_out$F,           # length(idx_win) x k_pls
      model = pls_out$model,
      idx   = idx_win
    )
  )
}

```

```{r}
compute_bic <- function(residuals, n, k_param) {
  rss <- sum(residuals^2)
  sigma2 <- rss / n
  n * log(sigma2) + k_param * log(n)
}
```

```{r}
# DI

build_design_DI <- function(y_h, F, k, sample_idx) {
  # y_h: komplette h-Step-Targetreihe (Länge T)
  # F:   Faktorenmatrix (T x Kmax)
  
  idx <- sample_idx[!is.na(y_h[sample_idx])]
  if (length(idx) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  y <- y_h[idx]
  X_f <- as.matrix(F[idx, 1:k, drop = FALSE])
  
  ok <- stats::complete.cases(cbind(y, X_f))
  y <- y[ok]
  X_f <- X_f[ok, , drop = FALSE]
  
  if (length(y) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  X <- cbind(Intercept = 1, X_f)
  list(y = y, X = X)
}

fit_DI <- function(y_h, F, k, sample_idx) {
  des <- build_design_DI(y_h, F, k, sample_idx)
  if (is.null(des)) return(NULL)
  
  mod <- lm(des$y ~ des$X - 1)
  list(model = mod)
}

predict_DI_at_origin <- function(fit_obj, F, t_idx, k) {
  if (is.null(fit_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  beta <- coef(fit_obj$model)
  
  # Intercept + erste k Faktoren
  x <- c(Intercept = 1, as.numeric(F[t_idx, 1:k]))
  if (length(beta) != length(x)) return(NA_real_)
  
  as.numeric(sum(x * beta))
}
```

```{r}
# DIAR

build_design_DIAR <- function(y_h, y_base, F, k, p, sample_idx) {
  # y_base: transformierte 1-Schritt-Reihe (aus panel_std1[, series_name])

  max_lag <- p
  idx <- sample_idx[sample_idx > max_lag & !is.na(y_h[sample_idx])]
  if (length(idx) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  y <- y_h[idx]
  X_f <- as.matrix(F[idx, 1:k, drop = FALSE])
  
  if (p > 0) {
    X_ylags <- sapply(1:p, function(j) y_base[idx - j])
    colnames(X_ylags) <- paste0("ylag", 1:p)
    X_raw <- cbind(X_f, X_ylags)
  } else {
    X_raw <- X_f
  }
  
  ok <- stats::complete.cases(cbind(y, X_raw))
  y <- y[ok]
  X_raw <- X_raw[ok, , drop = FALSE]
  
  if (length(y) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  X <- cbind(Intercept = 1, X_raw)
  list(y = y, X = X)
}

fit_DIAR_BIC <- function(y_h, y_base, F, k, sample_idx, max_p = 6) {
  best_bic <- Inf
  best_res <- NULL
  
  for (p in 0:max_p) {
    des <- build_design_DIAR(y_h, y_base, F, k, p, sample_idx)
    if (is.null(des)) next
    
    mod <- lm(des$y ~ des$X - 1)
    n <- length(des$y)
    k_param <- ncol(des$X)
    bic <- compute_bic(residuals(mod), n, k_param)
    
    if (bic < best_bic) {
      best_bic <- bic
      best_res <- list(model = mod, bic = bic, p = p, n = n)
    }
  }
  
  best_res
}

predict_DIARequation_at_origin <- function(fit_obj, F, y_base, t_idx, k) {
  if (is.null(fit_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  
  p <- fit_obj$p
  max_lag <- p
  
  # brauchen genug Vergangenheit für die y-Lags
  if (t_idx <= max_lag) return(NA_real_)
  
  # Faktoren am Origin t_idx
  X_f <- F[t_idx, 1:k, drop = FALSE]
  
  # y-Lags wie in build_design_DIAR
  if (p > 0) {
    y_lags <- sapply(1:p, function(j) y_base[t_idx - j])
    X_ylags <- matrix(y_lags, nrow = 1)
    colnames(X_ylags) <- paste0("ylag", 1:p)
    X_raw <- cbind(X_f, X_ylags)
  } else {
    X_raw <- X_f
  }
  
  if (any(!is.finite(c(X_raw)))) return(NA_real_)
  
  X_pred <- cbind(Intercept = 1, X_raw)
  beta   <- coef(fit_obj$model)
  
  # Sicherheit: Länge anpassen, falls lm irgendetwas Komisches angehängt hat
  if (length(beta) != ncol(X_pred)) {
    beta <- beta[1:ncol(X_pred)]
  }
  
  as.numeric(X_pred %*% beta)
}

```

```{r}
# DIAR-LAG

build_design_DIARLAG <- function(y_h, y_base, F, k, p, m, sample_idx) {
  # F: T x Kmax, wir nutzen die ersten k Spalten + m Lags davon

  max_lag <- max(p, m)
  idx <- sample_idx[sample_idx > max_lag & !is.na(y_h[sample_idx])]
  if (length(idx) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  y <- y_h[idx]
  
  # Faktor-Lags
  X_f_list <- list()
  for (j in 0:m) {
    Fj <- F[idx - j, 1:k, drop = FALSE]
    colnames(Fj) <- paste0("F", 1:k, "_lag", j)
    X_f_list[[j + 1]] <- Fj
  }
  X_f <- do.call(cbind, X_f_list)
  
  # y-Lags
  if (p > 0) {
    X_ylags <- sapply(1:p, function(j) y_base[idx - j])
    colnames(X_ylags) <- paste0("ylag", 1:p)
    X_raw <- cbind(X_f, X_ylags)
  } else {
    X_raw <- X_f
  }
  
  ok <- stats::complete.cases(cbind(y, X_raw))
  y <- y[ok]
  X_raw <- X_raw[ok, , drop = FALSE]
  
  if (length(y) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  X <- cbind(Intercept = 1, X_raw)
  list(y = y, X = X)
}

fit_DIARLAG_BIC <- function(y_h, y_base, F, k, sample_idx,
                            max_p = 6, max_m = 3) {
  if (k > 4) stop("DIAR-LAG erlaubt laut Bae (2024) maximal k = 4.")
  
  best_bic <- Inf
  best_res <- NULL
  
  for (m in 1:max_m) {
    for (p in 0:max_p) {
      des <- build_design_DIARLAG(y_h, y_base, F, k, p, m, sample_idx)
      if (is.null(des)) next
      
      mod <- lm(des$y ~ des$X - 1)
      n <- length(des$y)
      k_param <- ncol(des$X)
      bic <- compute_bic(residuals(mod), n, k_param)
      
      if (bic < best_bic) {
        best_bic <- bic
        best_res <- list(model = mod, bic = bic, p = p, m = m, n = n)
      }
    }
  }
  
  best_res
}

predict_DIARLAG_at_origin <- function(fit_obj, F, y_base, t_idx, k) {
  if (is.null(fit_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  
  p <- fit_obj$p
  m <- fit_obj$m
  max_lag <- max(p, m)
  
  # brauchen genügend Historie für Faktor- und y-Lags
  if (t_idx <= max_lag) return(NA_real_)
  
  # Faktor-Lags wie in build_design_DIARLAG
  X_f_list <- list()
  for (j in 0:m) {
    Fj <- F[t_idx - j, 1:k, drop = FALSE]
    colnames(Fj) <- paste0("F", 1:k, "_lag", j)
    X_f_list[[j + 1]] <- Fj
  }
  X_f <- do.call(cbind, X_f_list)
  
  # y-Lags
  if (p > 0) {
    y_lags <- sapply(1:p, function(j) y_base[t_idx - j])
    X_ylags <- matrix(y_lags, nrow = 1)
    colnames(X_ylags) <- paste0("ylag", 1:p)
    X_raw <- cbind(X_f, X_ylags)
  } else {
    X_raw <- X_f
  }
  
  if (any(!is.finite(c(X_raw)))) return(NA_real_)
  
  X_pred <- cbind(Intercept = 1, X_raw)
  beta   <- coef(fit_obj$model)
  
  if (length(beta) != ncol(X_pred)) {
    beta <- beta[1:ncol(X_pred)]
  }
  
  as.numeric(X_pred %*% beta)
}

```

```{r}
# Build AR(p) Designmatrix für gegebene Stichprobe
build_design_AR <- function(y_h, y_base, p, sample_idx) {
  # y_h: h-step Zielreihe, Länge T
  # y_base: Basisreihe (transformierte Originalserie), Länge T
  # p: Anzahl AR-Lags
  # sample_idx: Indizes, die für die Schätzung genutzt werden sollen
  
  max_lag <- p
  
  # wir brauchen t > p, damit alle Lags definiert sind
  idx <- sample_idx[sample_idx > max_lag & !is.na(y_h[sample_idx])]
  if (length(idx) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  y <- y_h[idx]
  
  if (p > 0) {
    X_ylags <- sapply(1:p, function(j) y_base[idx - j])
    colnames(X_ylags) <- paste0("ylag", 1:p)
    X_raw <- X_ylags
  } else {
    # p = 0 => nur Konstante
    X_raw <- NULL
  }
  
  if (!is.null(X_raw)) {
    ok <- stats::complete.cases(cbind(y, X_raw))
    y <- y[ok]
    X_raw <- X_raw[ok, , drop = FALSE]
  } else {
    ok <- stats::complete.cases(y)
    y <- y[ok]
  }
  
  if (length(y) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  if (is.null(X_raw)) {
    X <- matrix(1, nrow = length(y), ncol = 1)
    colnames(X) <- "Intercept"
  } else {
    X <- cbind(Intercept = 1, X_raw)
  }
  
  list(y = y, X = X)
}

fit_AR_BIC <- function(y_h, y_base, sample_idx, max_p = 6) {
  best_bic <- Inf
  best_res <- NULL
  
  for (p in 0:max_p) {
    des <- build_design_AR(y_h, y_base, p, sample_idx)
    if (is.null(des)) next
    
    mod <- lm(des$y ~ des$X - 1)
    n <- length(des$y)
    k_param <- ncol(des$X)
    bic <- compute_bic(residuals(mod), n, k_param)
    
    if (bic < best_bic) {
      best_bic <- bic
      best_res <- list(
        model = mod,
        bic   = bic,
        p     = p,
        n     = n
      )
    }
  }
  
  best_res
}

build_AR_row_for_origin <- function(y_base, t_index, p) {
  if (p == 0) {
    x_row <- c(Intercept = 1)
  } else {
    if (t_index <= p) return(NULL)
    lags <- sapply(1:p, function(j) y_base[t_index - j])
    if (any(!is.finite(lags))) return(NULL)
    x_row <- c(Intercept = 1, setNames(lags, paste0("ylag", 1:p)))
  }
  matrix(x_row, nrow = 1)
}

predict_AR_at_origin <- function(fit_obj, y_base, t_index) {
  if (is.null(fit_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  p <- fit_obj$p
  x_row <- build_AR_row_for_origin(y_base, t_index, p)
  if (is.null(x_row)) return(NA_real_)
  
  beta <- coef(fit_obj$model)
  as.numeric(x_row %*% beta)
}
```

```{r}
# Hilfsfunktionen

# recursive window: 1 ... t
get_recursive_idx <- function(t_idx) {
  1:t_idx
}

# rolling 10 year window
get_rolling_idx <- function(dates, t_idx) {
  t_date <- dates[t_idx]
  window_start <- t_date %m-% years(10)
  which(dates >= window_start & dates <= t_date)
}

predict_factor_model_at_origin <- function(fit_obj, F, t_idx, k) {
  if (is.null(fit_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  
  # Designzeile (Nur Faktoren)
  x_row <- c(1, F[t_idx, 1:k])
  
  beta <- coef(fit_obj$model)
  as.numeric(x_row %*% beta)
}
```

```{r}
run_forecasts_for_series <- function(series_name,
                                     h,
                                     dates,
                                     panel_final,      # balanced predictors
                                     panel_std1,       # für y_base
                                     targets_list,
                                     factor_method = c("PCA", "PLS"),
                                     k_max_pca = 12,
                                     k_max_pls = 12) {
  
  factor_method <- match.arg(factor_method)
  
  y_h    <- targets_list[[series_name]][[paste0("h", h)]]
  y_base <- panel_std1[[series_name]]
  
  Tn <- length(y_h)
  
  # Forecast-Storage (pro Durchlauf nur EINE Factor-Methode)
  k_max_common <- if (factor_method == "PCA") k_max_pca else k_max_pls
  
  out <- list(
    truth    = rep(NA_real_, Tn),
    DI_rec   = matrix(NA, Tn, k_max_common),
    DI_roll  = matrix(NA, Tn, k_max_common),
    DIAR_rec = matrix(NA, Tn, k_max_common),
    DIAR_roll= matrix(NA, Tn, k_max_common),
    DLAG_rec = matrix(NA, Tn, min(4, k_max_common)),
    DLAG_roll= matrix(NA, Tn, min(4, k_max_common)),
    AR_rec   = rep(NA_real_, Tn),
    AR_roll  = rep(NA_real_, Tn)
  )
  
  for (t_idx in 60:(Tn - h)) {
  
    # --- define true value ---
    # y_h[t_idx] entspricht bereits y_{t_idx + h}
    out$truth[t_idx] <- y_h[t_idx]
    if (is.na(out$truth[t_idx])) next
  
    t_origin <- dates[t_idx]
    
    # --- Faktoren extrahieren ---
    fcts <- extract_factors_at_origin(
      panel_final  = panel_final,
      targets_list = targets_list,
      target_name  = series_name,
      h            = h,
      t_origin     = t_origin,
      k_max_pca    = k_max_pca,
      k_max_pls    = k_max_pls
    )
    
    if (factor_method == "PCA") {
      F_used <- fcts$pca$F
    } else {
      F_used <- fcts$pls$F
    }
    
    if (exists("DEBUG_PLS") && isTRUE(DEBUG_PLS) && factor_method == "PLS" && t_idx %in% DEBUG_ORIGINS) {
      message(sprintf(
        "[RUN] t_idx=%d date=%s | dim(F_used)=%s | k_max_common=%d | k_max_used=%d",
        t_idx, as.character(t_origin),
        paste(dim(F_used), collapse="x"),
        k_max_common, min(k_max_common, ncol(F_used))
      ))
    }

    
    # Sicherheit: nicht mehr k als Spalten vorhanden
    k_max_used <- min(k_max_common, ncol(F_used))
    
    # --- sample indices ---
    idx_rec  <- get_recursive_idx(t_idx)
    idx_roll <- get_rolling_idx(dates, t_idx)
    
    # -------- AR(BIC) (unabhängig von Faktoren) --------
    ar_fit_rec  <- fit_AR_BIC(y_h, y_base, idx_rec)
    ar_fit_roll <- fit_AR_BIC(y_h, y_base, idx_roll)
    
    out$AR_rec[t_idx]  <- predict_AR_at_origin(ar_fit_rec,  y_base, t_idx)
    out$AR_roll[t_idx] <- predict_AR_at_origin(ar_fit_roll, y_base, t_idx)
    
    # -------- DI --------
    for (k in 1:k_max_used) {
      di_fit_rec  <- fit_DI(y_h, F_used, k, idx_rec)
      di_fit_roll <- fit_DI(y_h, F_used, k, idx_roll)
      
      if (!is.null(di_fit_rec))
        out$DI_rec[t_idx, k] <- predict_DI_at_origin(di_fit_rec,  F_used, t_idx, k)
      if (!is.null(di_fit_roll))
        out$DI_roll[t_idx, k] <- predict_DI_at_origin(di_fit_roll, F_used, t_idx, k)
    }
    
    # -------- DIAR --------
    for (k in 1:k_max_used) {
      diar_fit_rec  <- fit_DIAR_BIC(y_h, y_base, F_used, k, idx_rec,  max_p = 6)
      diar_fit_roll <- fit_DIAR_BIC(y_h, y_base, F_used, k, idx_roll, max_p = 6)
      
      if (!is.null(diar_fit_rec))
        out$DIAR_rec[t_idx, k] <- predict_DIARequation_at_origin(diar_fit_rec, F_used, y_base, t_idx, k)
      if (!is.null(diar_fit_roll))
        out$DIAR_roll[t_idx, k] <- predict_DIARequation_at_origin(diar_fit_roll, F_used, y_base, t_idx, k)
    }
    
    # -------- DIAR-LAG (k ≤ 4) --------
    for (k in 1:min(4, k_max_used)) {
      dlag_fit_rec  <- fit_DIARLAG_BIC(y_h, y_base, F_used, k, idx_rec,  max_p = 6, max_m = 3)
      dlag_fit_roll <- fit_DIARLAG_BIC(y_h, y_base, F_used, k, idx_roll, max_p = 6, max_m = 3)
      
      if (!is.null(dlag_fit_rec))
        out$DLAG_rec[t_idx, k] <- predict_DIARLAG_at_origin(dlag_fit_rec, F_used, y_base, t_idx, k)
      if (!is.null(dlag_fit_roll))
        out$DLAG_roll[t_idx, k] <- predict_DIARLAG_at_origin(dlag_fit_roll, F_used, y_base, t_idx, k)
    }
  }
  
  out
}


```

```{r}
calc_mse <- function(truth, pred) {
  ok <- is.finite(truth) & is.finite(pred)
  if (!any(ok)) return(NA_real_)
  mean((truth[ok] - pred[ok])^2)
}
```

```{r}

compute_rmse_for_scheme <- function(res,
                                    dates,
                                    scheme = c("recursive", "rolling"),
                                    eval_start,
                                    eval_end,
                                    k_max_factor,
                                    factor_method) {
  scheme <- match.arg(scheme)
  
  if (scheme == "recursive") {
    ar_pred   <- res$AR_rec
    DI_mat    <- res$DI_rec
    DIAR_mat  <- res$DIAR_rec
    DLAG_mat  <- res$DLAG_rec
  } else {
    ar_pred   <- res$AR_roll
    DI_mat    <- res$DI_roll
    DIAR_mat  <- res$DIAR_roll
    DLAG_mat  <- res$DLAG_roll
  }
  
  idx_eval   <- which(dates >= eval_start & dates <= eval_end)
  truth_eval <- res$truth[idx_eval]
  
  mse_ar <- calc_mse(truth_eval, ar_pred[idx_eval])
  if (!is.finite(mse_ar)) {
    warning("MSE(AR) ist NA/Inf in diesem Eval-Fenster.")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  di_list <- lapply(1:k_max_factor, function(k) {
    mse_k <- calc_mse(truth_eval, DI_mat[idx_eval, k])
    tibble(
      scheme      = scheme,
      factor_method = factor_method,
      model       = "DI",
      k           = k,
      mse         = mse_k,
      mse_ar      = mse_ar,
      rmse_rel    = mse_k / mse_ar
    )
  })
  
  diar_list <- lapply(1:k_max_factor, function(k) {
    mse_k <- calc_mse(truth_eval, DIAR_mat[idx_eval, k])
    tibble(
      scheme      = scheme,
      factor_method = factor_method,
      model       = "DIAR",
      k           = k,
      mse         = mse_k,
      mse_ar      = mse_ar,
      rmse_rel    = mse_k / mse_ar
    )
  })
  
  dlag_list <- lapply(1:min(4, k_max_factor), function(k) {
    mse_k <- calc_mse(truth_eval, DLAG_mat[idx_eval, k])
    tibble(
      scheme      = scheme,
      factor_method = factor_method,
      model       = "DIAR-LAG",
      k           = k,
      mse         = mse_k,
      mse_ar      = mse_ar,
      rmse_rel    = mse_k / mse_ar
    )
  })
  
  ar_row <- tibble(
    scheme       = scheme,
    factor_method = factor_method,
    model        = "AR",
    k            = NA_integer_,
    mse          = mse_ar,
    mse_ar       = mse_ar,
    rmse_rel     = 1
  )
  
  bind_rows(di_list, diar_list, dlag_list, ar_row) %>%
    filter(is.finite(mse))
}

```

```{r}
compute_rmse_for_series_h <- function(series_name,
                                      h,
                                      dates,
                                      panel_final,
                                      panel_std1,
                                      targets_list,
                                      factor_method = c("PCA", "PLS"),
                                      eval_start = as.Date("1970-01-01"),
                                      eval_end   = as.Date("2019-12-01"),
                                      k_max_pca  = 12,
                                      k_max_pls  = 12) {
  
  factor_method <- match.arg(factor_method)
  k_max_factor  <- if (factor_method == "PCA") k_max_pca else k_max_pls
  
  res <- run_forecasts_for_series(
    series_name   = series_name,
    h             = h,
    dates         = dates,
    panel_final   = panel_final,
    panel_std1    = panel_std1,
    targets_list  = targets_list,
    factor_method = factor_method,
    k_max_pca     = k_max_pca,
    k_max_pls     = k_max_pls
  )
  
  rec_tbl  <- compute_rmse_for_scheme(
    res, dates, "recursive",
    eval_start, eval_end,
    k_max_factor = k_max_factor,
    factor_method = factor_method
  )
  
  roll_tbl <- compute_rmse_for_scheme(
    res, dates, "rolling",
    eval_start, eval_end,
    k_max_factor = k_max_factor,
    factor_method = factor_method
  )
  
  bind_rows(rec_tbl, roll_tbl) %>%
    mutate(
      series = series_name,
      h      = h,
      .before = 1
    )
}


```

```{r}
rmse_subset <- tibble()

append_rmse_for_series <- function(rmse_store,
                                   series_name,
                                   factor_method = c("PCA", "PLS"),
                                   horizons = c(1, 6, 12, 24),
                                   dates,
                                   panel_final,
                                   panel_std1,
                                   targets_list,
                                   eval_start = as.Date("1970-01-01"),
                                   eval_end   = as.Date("2019-12-01"),
                                   k_max_pca  = 12,
                                   k_max_pls  = 12) {
  
  factor_method <- match.arg(factor_method)
  
  res_series <- purrr::map_dfr(horizons, function(h) {
    compute_rmse_for_series_h(
      series_name   = series_name,
      h             = h,
      dates         = dates,
      panel_final   = panel_final,
      panel_std1    = panel_std1,
      targets_list  = targets_list,
      factor_method = factor_method,
      eval_start    = eval_start,
      eval_end      = eval_end,
      k_max_pca     = k_max_pca,
      k_max_pls     = k_max_pls
    )
  })
  
  dplyr::bind_rows(rmse_store, res_series)
}

```

```{r}
# compute rmse for a subset of variables
# vars <- c("INDPRO","HWIURATIO","HOUST","CMRMTSPLx",
#          "INVEST","AAA","CPIAUCSL","S.P.500")

vars <- c("HWIURATIO","HOUST","CMRMTSPLx", "INVEST","AAA","CPIAUCSL","S.P.500")
for (hor in c(1, 6, 12, 24)) {
  for (fm in c("PCA", "PLS")) {
    for (s in vars) {
      rmse_subset <- append_rmse_for_series(
        rmse_store   = rmse_subset,
        series_name  = s,
        factor_method = fm,
        horizons     = hor,
        dates        = panel_final$date,
        panel_final  = panel_final,
        panel_std1   = panel_std1,
        targets_list = targets_list
      )
    }
  }
}
```


```{r}
# compute rmse for all series

series_vec <- names(targets_list)
horizons   <- c(1, 6, 12, 24)

rmse_all <- purrr::map_dfr(series_vec, function(s) {
  purrr::map_dfr(horizons, function(h) {
    compute_rmse_for_series_h(
      series_name  = s,
      h            = h,
      dates        = panel_final$date,
      panel_final  = panel_final,
      panel_std1   = panel_std1,
      targets_list = targets_list,
      eval_start   = as.Date("1970-01-01"),
      eval_end     = as.Date("2019-12-01"),
      k_max_pca    = 12,
      k_max_pls    = 12
    )
  })
})

```

```{r}
# Generate figures
fig_diarlag_h1_rec <- rmse_subset %>%
  filter(model  == "DIAR-LAG",
         scheme == "recursive",
         h      == 1) %>%
  group_by(factor_method, k) %>%
  summarise(mean_rmse_rel = mean(rmse_rel, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(fig_diarlag_h1_rec,
       aes(x = k, y = mean_rmse_rel, group = factor_method)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = factor_method)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = factor_method)) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of factors k",
    y = "Mean RMSE relative to AR(BIC)",
    linetype = "Factors",
    shape    = "Factors",
    title    = "DIAR-LAG, recursive, h = 1: PCA vs PLS"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
